title: Round wood for processing
description: The MOVING reference member state of this VC (Value Chain) is NMK. The reference MOVING Card ID of this VC is VC 10 NMK. Mainly the state owne company (Makedonski Shumi) deals with the forestry and wood in the region of Maleshevija. Few private initiatives, from private forestry owners (very few in number) are also arising.

title: Mountain landscape and reference chains
description: The reference mountain chain of this VC is Mountain Meleshevija. The reference mountain landscape of this VC is unspecified. Maleshevski mountains are located in the eastern part of the Republic of North Macedonia. The are covers the municipalities of Berovo and Pehchevo, and is characterized with the natural and cultural wealth. Two rivers cross the region, Bregalnica and Strumica. Forests covers 52% of the Maleshevija region, while pastures around 20%.

title: Interest on this VC
description: The forests in the Maleshevija Mountain take place with around 52%. Mostly there are pine forest (f. Pinacae), oak forest (f. Quercacae) and the beech forest (f. Fugacae). The wood in all matters, is with a bog potential of this region. Wood, in all its forms is with high potential for development. Distributed to processing mills for further transformation. Wood is one of the main products in the Maleshevija mountains, which is used for different reasons, in different industries across the country.

title: Challenges
description: Most of the forest in Maleshevija, is state owned, and there is a Public Entity dealing with the wood and forest in general. The main challenge is also the illegitimate deforestation and the grey market. Overall the type of challenge faced by this VC is Current and Predicted. This VC is classified as Traditional and Innovative.
